## Issues

Closes #

## Summary

Adds Docker and Google Cloud Build support for building and pushing container images from the main-branch trigger, with deployment kept as a separate manual step.

## Changes

- Added production multi-stage container build in `Dockerfile`.
- Added `.dockerignore` for lean and safer image build context.
- Added `cloudbuild.yaml` configured for `us-west1` Artifact Registry image build + push.
- Added runbook `docs/google-cloud-build-docker.md` covering:
  - required GCP APIs and Artifact Registry setup
  - trigger expectations on `main`
  - manual Cloud Run deployment flow
  - runtime env var and secret handling guidance
- Updated docs navigation in `README.md` and `docs/index.md` to include the Cloud Build runbook.

## Verification

- [x] `npm run build`
- [x] `npm run test`
- [x] `npm run test:coverage`
- [x] `npx prisma validate`
- [x] Relevant endpoint checks completed

## Checklist

- [x] No secrets were added
- [x] README and docs updated (if needed)
- [x] Backward compatibility considered
